Name: gpio_s.addr
Description: Selects which internal register (e.g., IO_DIR, IO_OUT, INTMASK, INTFLAGS, PINCTRL, IO readback) is accessed within the module’s address window; used to generate cs_int and to decode rd/wr destinations.

Name: gpio_s.IO_DIR
Description: Defines per-bit pin direction; controls whether each io bit is driven by IO_OUT or left high-Z for input.

Name: gpio_s.INTFLAGS
Description: Latches per-pin interrupt status; software clears bits by writing ones to this register; drives int via OR-reduction.
